title: astragalus lentiformis
intro: Astragalus lentiformis, also known as the lentil vetch or Chinese milk vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus lentiformis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically studied.
